Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x05F0 "WACKYDARTS-05F0" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Wacky Darts.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Made the following changes to default to joystick in port two: 1. Patched the STA $0529 instruction at $0642 to be JSR $1300 instead 2. Added a small routine at $1300 to store $00 in $0529, which causes the game to default to joystick in port 2
